---
name: Feature request
about: Idea for a new plugin, command, or core capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem are you solving?**
The user-facing pain or unmet need, not the implementation.

**Proposed solution**
What would the user type / see / get?

**Where does it live?**
- [ ] New plugin (`src/netsentry/plugins/<name>.py`)
- [ ] New command on an existing plugin
- [ ] New core abstraction (router/notifier/AI/...)
- [ ] Docs / packaging / quality-of-life

**Alternatives considered**

**Willing to contribute the PR?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe, with guidance
- [ ] No, just an idea
